  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the fabrication of a Graphene Field Effect Transistor (GFET). The goal is to create and characterize a graphene-based electronic device.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A person wearing gloves is shown handling a small glass container containing a liquid solution. They use tweezers to place a piece of graphene onto a substrate.",
    "The graphene is then transferred using tweezers onto a silicon wafer, which is part of the GFET fabrication process.",
    "The person uses a pipette to add a liquid solution to a petri dish, likely for further processing or cleaning purposes.",
    "Graphene is deposited onto a substrate using a spin-coating method, followed by the application of a photoresist layer.",
    "The process includes the use of a UV light source to cure the photoresist, ensuring proper adhesion of the graphene film."
  ],

  ],
